# Inspectrum Inspections

> NACHI-certified home inspection company serving Evergreen, Denver Metro, Boulder, Fort Collins, and Colorado mountain communities. Owner-operated, 20+ years of construction experience, same-day reports.

## Business Info

- Name: Inspectrum Inspections
- Phone: (303) 697-0990
- Email: office@evergreeninspections.com
- Location: Evergreen, CO 80439
- Service area: Colorado Front Range (Evergreen, Denver, Boulder, Fort Collins, Lakewood, Golden, Conifer, Morrison, Bailey, Idaho Springs)
- Hours: Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 8am–12pm, Sun closed
- Certifications: NACHI Certified, Evergreen Chamber of Commerce member

## Services

### Full Home Inspection
Top-to-bottom inspection of every major system: structure, foundation, roof, exterior, electrical, plumbing, HVAC, insulation, interior. Includes on-site walkthrough and same-day PDF report with photos. Starting at $450. Plan ~1 hour per 1,000 sq ft, 3-hour minimum.
URL: https://evergreeninspections.com/services/full-inspection

### Radon Testing
48-hour continuous monitor radon testing with hourly readings and same-day results. EPA-certified equipment. Half of Colorado homes test above the 4.0 pCi/L action level. Starting at $150. Can be combined with full inspection.
URL: https://evergreeninspections.com/services/radon

### Mold Assessment
Visual mold inspection with moisture mapping and thermal imaging. Same-day photo-rich report. We assess and refer — we never sell remediation. Starting at $250. Meth residue testing also available.
URL: https://evergreeninspections.com/services/mold

### Commercial Property Inspection
Inspections for offices, retail, light industrial, mixed-use, and investment properties. Covers building envelope, electrical, HVAC, plumbing, interior, and site conditions. Custom scope and pricing.
URL: https://evergreeninspections.com/services/commercial

### Pre-Listing Inspection
For sellers — find issues before buyers do. Same thoroughness as a buyer's inspection. Starting at $400.

### À La Carte / Hourly
Individual system inspections, warranty walkthroughs, builder follow-ups. Hourly rate available.

## About the Inspector

Harry Foster — founder and lead inspector. 28 years in construction before transitioning to home inspections. NACHI certified. Based in Evergreen, CO. Every inspection includes a free phone consultation with no expiration.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How long does a full inspection take?
A: About one hour per 1,000 sq ft, with a 3-hour minimum. A typical 2,500 sq ft home takes about 3 hours plus a 20-30 minute walkthrough.

Q: When will I get the report?
A: Same day in nearly every case. Detailed PDF with photos, observations, and prioritized recommendations.

Q: Do you test for radon?
A: Yes. 48-hour continuous monitor testing, starting at $150. Can be added to a full inspection.

Q: What areas do you serve?
A: Evergreen, Denver Metro, Boulder, Fort Collins, Lakewood, Golden, Conifer, Morrison, Bailey, Idaho Springs, and surrounding Colorado communities.

Q: How do I schedule?
A: Book online at evergreeninspections.com/schedule or call (303) 697-0990. We typically confirm within a few hours.
